item.title: Rep. Gabe Evans (R-CO) voted to slash over $1 trillion from Medicaid and the ACA.We asked Rep. Evans if he is concerned about the people in his district who will lose healthcare, and may die, because of his vote. He laughed. Then he ran away.

item.title: Hell yeah, Colorado!
item.description: Article: https://www.erininthemorning.com/p/colorado-supreme-court-rules-hospitals Bluesky Post: https://bsky.app/profile/gwenisbackonherbs.bsky.social/post/3mm5x5otj3s2n Bluesky #Transnews Feed: https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:6fvvaoxvxgea7ngj6vrpwnts/feed/aaak2fi4mdlqs
item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS

item.title: Sweet, sweet satisfaction
item.description:
Drama ensued. TL;DR: meme says it all. I got a fantastic job. I work in a niche field that’s only been around for a few decades and I’ve been doing it for 13 years. At my orientation, the top brass introduced themselves and said “you’re the gal with a lot of experience!” And I thought I had found a good place that saw beyond my gender. Unfortunately, the field is incredibly unbalanced (average of one chick to 20 “macho” dudes and I was the only gal expert on this particular team). As a “macho” chick with a good sense of humor usually it doesn’t bother me. However… C-suite ex special-forces dude made up his mind I didn’t know what I was doing despite extensive experience, training, and knowledge in an abstract field. Mind you, I was a low level manager—three levels below this dude. Customers were satisfied (quantitatively), fellow employees and boss sung my praises, but this guy shifted milestones daily and refused to talk to me directly, bullying my super fantastic but non-expert boss about irrelevant and literally impossible, ever-changing expectations. A particularly aggravating example: requiring a full-fledged curriculum on a product before engineering had even defined the features. I read an 800 page Navy training manual to try to speak this dude’s narrow language and I learned a lot from it but that’s not really relevant to the customer. The constant reproach started to take a toll on my health. He would throw his “examples” into chat gpt which most certainly is not trained on the particulars of this field, let alone the product. He fed me trash and I recycled what I could while translating the real requirements in simple terms to meet the mutual goal. It was more inefficient to parse through AI b.s. than to draft it myself by about 3x. Not that it made any difference. I went above my boss—with his knowledge—to the VP for a good strategy. Unfortunately, he was a spineless fish that looked like a macho guy but was really a Silicon Valley type. He said that he did me a disservice by not “selling me” (ew) to his boss and that it should shake out after six months and I was doing a great job. So I waited and kept trying, sinking my soul in a vain attempt to get the powerful bully off my back. Scheduled a meeting to directly talk with this thorny jerk which he canceled 3x in a row. And finally, I got his approval on a deliverable. I literally made the project plan to have his initials when he approved it and the next week, he pivoted and said it wasn’t good enough. I continuously try to improve and have a graduate-level certification in that particular area. After internal analysis, I was only able to conclude that the dude wanted me to quit. He was notorious for firing people; he gave an official strike to someone on my team, three levels down, who used the word “demonstrate” when asking for advice on how best to teach a feature. I kid you not. As a wise man with an equally badass background told me, “If you find yourself in an ambush, just get out of there. They are prepared to take you out and know the environment that they are working with better than you. They have the advantage. Get out, figure out how to respond, and then act.” It really stuck with me and after 3 months of being ambushed after every deliverable I provided, I quit. I warned my boss that he was getting the same treatment and that they were coming after him but he tried to ride it out. He was fired in an atrocious manner by the senior leader jerk two months later and what is worse—he and that C-suite guy were friends in the former badass life. Fast forward, C-suite guy got too big for his britches and staged a mini coup that backfired. He was canned and had actively sabotaged the department I had worked for, leaving it a mess. My boss’s replacement saw what I had done and really liked it and asked if I was interested in coming back. I think I will because I like the job and genuinely try to look out for the customers because I have been in their shoes, but if I hadn’t quit I wouldn’t have had the strength to get to this point. Take care of yourselves, friends. You deserve better than abuse, in any form. Learn, adapt, and walk away if it takes too much of a toll. I believe in you.
Cat tax
item.dc:creator: amaihai

item.title: Warning: Contains TRANS and LGBTQ Content
item.description: In order BlueSky Post - https://bsky.app/profile/tillybridges.bsky.social/post/3mm5znmu2bk2v FCC PDF - https://docs.fcc.gov/public/attachments/DA-26-392A1.pdf Tell the FCC your thoughts - https://glaad.org/fcc This is the location to submit an express reply electronically: https://www.fcc.gov/ecfs/filings/express TLDR - The FCC wants to add advisory labels for LGBTQ and TRANS content in media portrayed on American television. Claiming that such things are not for younger viewers, etc etc. This may or may not include raising the age rate of said content, etc etc. Tell the FCC to fuck off.

item.title: I'm a hippopotamus and I got noodles on my back
item.dc:creator: CanadianLadyMoose

item.title: I miss you so much, baby. I love you so much.
item.description: I'm getting better. Haven't cried for most of the day, but I'm sitting here alone at home now. It's not home anymore without her. The last time I felt like this was when I had to have Snooks put down. It's a homesick feeling, like when I was away in college many years ago. The emptiness, the horrible quiet, is an awful feeling.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Birb n Frn
item.description: Front page edit: This is not AI.If you believe this is AI, you really need to examine quite a few things. First and foremost, the key argument is seeing that the animals are getting along too well. The cat is apprehensive and not exactly gentle with the bird at all times. However, a situation like this are very common. I've had house wrens, sparrows, and other small birds imprint on myself and animals I've had throughout. I used to have a great Pyrenees that had three birds that would collect fur from it and then sleep on it during the day when it lounged about. Just something that happens. Things like this occur in the real world. Thank you. Also, looking at a lot of these accounts that are saying that this is AI, it's fun looking through your favorite history and some of your post-history, where you're posting AI-generated art... (However, these are a little bit more of a compilation. This is not the same bird and the same cat in every shot.) I'm not doing well. I don't think anybody really is right now are we? But this was cute, made me smile. FP edit Just some Squirrel stuff https://imgur.com/gallery/sc0HhGA
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

24
25
26 Man Tax: William Gregory Lee
"If you do not know which port you are seeking, no wind is favorable." - Seneca So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #473
item.description: Trump dropped his $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS Monday in exchange for a $1.776 billion fund he controls. The move came 48 hours before a federal judge's deadline requiring Trump's side to explain whether a sitting president can legally sue agencies he runs. Now Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, Trump's former criminal defense lawyer, will appoint the commission deciding who gets a piece of nearly $2 billion. Claims stay open through the end of his term. Rep. Jamie Raskin called the fund unconstitutional. Treasury's top attorney quit hours after the announcement. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell Congress to stop the payoffs to Trump's allies before he starts cutting checks. I've emailed 7,461 stories over 473 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260518-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/canada-board [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may18 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/miscarriage-study [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-goodrx [5] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-apl [6] https://go.govbrief.today/court-arrests [7] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-splc [8] https://go.govbrief.today/sa-refugees [9] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-ky [10] https://go.govbrief.today/dozens-confirmed [11] https://go.govbrief.today/thune-macdonough [12] https://go.govbrief.today/vaccine-exemptions [13] https://go.govbrief.today/lirr-update [14] https://go.govbrief.today/nyt-pentagon-2 [15] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-slush [16] https://go.govbrief.today/minn-ice-charged Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: The silent kittens
item.description: The Guatemala Kittens have been largely silent. Of course Number Four Ever used to scream when I picked him up, but other than that, these six babies are the quietest I’ve ever had. No meowing, no purring, maybe a couple of screeches as they play, but I don’t even really know what they sound like. Maybe they should spend some time with Scoots and Mads because THEY make themselves known. But maybe quiet kittens are good for their forever families. It’s just weird
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
